inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the individual, used for retirement planning context.

inputs.label: Current Portfolio
inputs.businessContext: Total current invested assets, the starting point for future growth.

inputs.label: Monthly Savings
inputs.businessContext: Amount saved each month, assumed to be invested consistently.

inputs.label: Annual Expenses in Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual living expenses after reaching financial independence.

inputs.label: Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual investment return rate (e.g., 7% for a diversified portfolio).

inputs.label: Safe Withdrawal Rate
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of the portfolio withdrawn annually to cover expenses without depleting principal (commonly 4%).
